summary: Tested Siasat.com auto-scraper feature. All backend APIs working correctly (GET/POST /api/scraper/status, /api/scraper/trigger). Admin panel shows scraper control card with Scrape Now button. Scraped articles appear in feed with proper source='siasat.com' badges. Deduplication working - second trigger added 0 new articles (until new content available on siasat.com). 34 total articles, 28 from siasat.com.

issues: Some siasat.com articles show grey placeholder instead of images - this is expected as scraper doesn't always find og:image from articles

passed_tests: GET /api/scraper/status returns last_run, articles_added, running, error fields
Deduplication works - calling trigger twice doesn't create duplicates
Scraped articles appear in GET /api/news/feed with proper titles
Articles have valid categories (national, city, state, etc.)
Admin panel shows 'Siasat.com Auto-Scraper' control card
Admin panel shows 'Scrape Now' button with data-testid='trigger-scraper-btn'
Scraper status displays last_run time and articles_added count
Admin articles table shows 'siasat.com' orange badge for scraped articles
Clicking Scrape Now button triggers scraper and updates status
Scraped articles display correctly in main news feed
Category filter tabs work (All News, National, City, etc.)
Article cards show title, summary, timestamp, share button

critical_code_review_comments: Category mapping defaults to 'national' when URL path doesn't match known patterns - this is expected behavior
Scraper runs automatically every 30 minutes via asyncio.create_task in startup
10 of 28 siasat articles have images - scraper extracts og:image from parent containers
YouTube video feed is still MOCKED (hardcoded) per previous iterations
seed_data_creation: Scraper auto-created ~34 articles from siasat.com on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Scraper feature fully working. 34 articles in DB, 28 from siasat.com. Category mapping defaults to 'national' for URLs without path patterns like /hyderabad/, /telangana/. Some articles lack images (scraper extracts from og:image tag which isn't always present). MOCKED: YouTube video feed still uses hardcoded data.

mocked_apis.YouTube video feed: Still hardcoded, not from real API
